reviews.text:
Kimi was absolutely amazing from start to finish. From the beginning, I was honest with her that I was considering multiple photographers for our engagement, and the way she handled that immediately stood out to me. When I mentioned another photographer I was looking at, she didn’t put them down at all. In fact, she spoke highly of them and simply explained that their style was different from hers, then helped me understand what to look for when comparing the two. That level of honesty and integrity says a lot about the way she runs her business.

Throughout the planning process, Kimi was incredibly patient and helpful. I had a lot of questions, requests, and back-and-forth about location, timing, and all the small details, and she never made me feel like I was being difficult. She was understanding, responsive, and genuinely wanted the day to go well.

On the day of the proposal, she went above and beyond. She helped set up the flowers at the top of Eagle’s Nest, made everything feel smooth and stress-free, and guided us through the photos so naturally. She told us how to pose, helped us feel comfortable, and captured everything beautifully. The champagne pop photos ended up being some of our absolute favorites.

The pictures came back in a timely fashion, and we couldn’t be happier with them. Kimi is kind, professional, talented, and clearly cares about the people she works with. She definitely over-delivered, and I would highly recommend her to anyone looking for an engagement or wedding photographer.

Kimi is the absolute best! Not only does she take incredible photos but she’s so great with kids and giving direction! My youngest was definitely not having it but she had all the tricks in her bag to turn the entire evening around! The pictures turned out amazing and still to the day They are our favorite family photos that we’ve ever taken! I can’t wait to book with her again!

My husband I absolutely loved working with Kimi. Kimi did both our engagement and wedding photos and they all turned our incredible. Kimi was communicative and helped us get all the photos we wanted. She helped us pose, and kept us laughing. I had multiple people from my wedding tell me how much they loved our photographer and the presence she brought to the wedding. She captured all the details that I didn’t get to see day of because I was being rushed around and I love having them to look back on. I told her family photos were really important to me and she helped make that a priority so that everything we wanted to captured. I would 100% recommend having her stick around throughout the entire reception because our photos from the dance floor are some of our favorite. I cannot say enough good things about Kimi. From the quality of her work to her delightful personality you cannot go wrong using her as your photographer.

Kimi is a delight to work with; a true professional from start to finish of the photo process. This is my 4th project I’ve done with her and would 10/10 recommend her for couples, weddings, engagements, family portraits, and seniors. She makes you feel at ease the moment she meets you and helps you forget the camera is even there. A great talent in the Eagle River Valley, and I look forward to working with Kimi D Photography again!

For one person Kimberly seemed to be everywhere, getting every shot. She was professional and courteous the whole time. She was full of helpful advice to help guests look good in their portraits. Definitively worth the price.
